flags.description: All supplier quotes exceed the budget by more than 20% (cheapest quote is 2058.2% over budget). The budget may be too low for this category or quantity.
4 suppliers are ranked within 0.0146 points of each other (threshold: 0.05). The ranking adds little decision value — any quote may be equivalent.
The preferred-supplier 10% bonus elevated 'Lenovo Commercial EU' from rank 0.0449 to 0.0494, above the next-ranked supplier at 0.0494. Without the bonus this supplier would not have ranked #1.
